CC=clang CXX=clang++ ../binutils-2.25/configure --prefix=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local --target=aarch64-linux-android --with-gmp=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --with-mpc=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --with-mpfr=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --disable-nls --enable-lto --enable-64-bit-bfd --enable-deterministic-archives --with-sysroot=/data/data/com.termux/files
